currentFocus: Coordination-policy bootstrap integration is locally reconciled; fresh read-only acceptance is next before any broad write fanout.

currentTruth.publicPrimaryRepo: The public repo remains the primary collaboration repo for source, docs, tools, tests, RE notes, wave notes, state batons, agent reports, readiness notes, and compact proof summaries that are non-secret and non-payload.

coordinationPolicyBootstrap.scope: durable coordination policy plus one canonical goal/state reconciliation

currentTruth.claimBoundary: No product source, product tests, runtime behavior, patch semantics, launch behavior, safe-copy behavior, Host/Join capability, runtime proof, release/publication action, Ghidra mutation, hard-payload boundary, or installed-game/original-BEA mutation changed.
currentTruth.productBaseline: WinUI 3 remains the primary app, AppCore remains shared correctness logic, the C# CLI remains a support lane, and Python tooling remains repo/lab support.

runtimeBoundaries.onlineMultiplayer: not player-ready; Host/Join remains disabled until required distinct-endpoint and source-bound copied-runtime proof exists
runtimeBoundaries.staticReClosure: static closure is not runtime, gameplay, visual, online, rebuild, or parity proof

currentTruth.hardPayloadBoundary: Hard payloads, raw proof logs, screenshots/frame dumps, copied executable output, full Ghidra databases, secrets, .env files, local config, caches, and build/package output stay out of git and release ZIPs; use LOCAL_LAB_OVERLAY.md for local-only placement.

activeSlice.name: coordination-policy-bootstrap-integration
activeSlice.goal: integrate accepted coordination policy bootstrap commit, reconcile canonical state once, validate, and send to fresh read-only acceptance before broad write fanout
activeSlice.claimBoundary: documentation/state policy only; no product/runtime/test behavior, release/publication state, Host/Join readiness, runtime proof, Ghidra state, or installed-game/original-BEA mutation changes

validation.thisIntegration: Final command results live in the local integration report. Required closeout gates are git diff --check, docs commands, Markdown links, repo hygiene, public allowlist, hard-payload safety, state JSON parse, and integration report JSON parse.
validation.previousProductSliceEvidence: Use the slice readiness notes and release/readiness/PUBLIC_SIGNOFF_COMMANDS.md instead of expanding historical command logs in this baton.

nextSteps: Complete fresh read-only acceptance of the coordination-policy integration and release the integration/state lease.
Use the coordination contracts to assign exactly one writer for any BinaryPatchesPage, PatchBench helper/model, or focused PatchBench test changes.
Inspect safe-copy canceled/failed/restored/source-changed status copy and defensive receipt Host/Join fallback for a small presentation-only extraction or guard-hardening candidate.

Keep patch rows, launch behavior, safe-copy behavior, music, online gates, runtime proof, release packaging, and installed-game mutation rules out of the next product slice unless evidence reveals a bounded bug.
